slash_commands.name: test
slash_commands.description: Generate unit tests for selected code
slash_commands.prompt:
Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following code. Include edge cases and mock any dependencies. Use the testing framework that's already in the project.

{{clipboard}}

slash_commands.name: explain
slash_commands.description: Explain how the selected code works
slash_commands.prompt:
Explain the following code in simple terms. Include what it does, how it works, and any important considerations.

{{clipboard}}

slash_commands.name: refactor
slash_commands.description: Refactor selected code for better quality
slash_commands.prompt:
Refactor the following code to improve: - Readability - Performance - Best practices - Error handling

{{clipboard}}

slash_commands.name: docs
slash_commands.prompt:
Generate documentation for the following code. Include JSDoc comments and explain parameters and return values.

{{clipboard}}

slash_commands.name: fix
slash_commands.description: Fix bugs or issues in selected code
slash_commands.prompt:
Analyze the following code for potential bugs or issues. Provide a fixed version with explanations.

{{clipboard}}
